particulars.description: Leasehold land and buildings known as 103 - 104 commercial road, swindon SN1 5PL and registered with title number WT455453.
Leasehold land and buildings known as 103-104 commercial road, swindon, SN1 5PL and registered with title number WT455453.
None at the date of this deed.

The leasehold property to be known as ground floor premises, 103-104 commercial road, swindon, SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease dated 8TH december 2020 between 104 commercial limited (1) and 103 rentals limited (2).

The leasehold property to be known as flat 1 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 2 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 3 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 4 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 5 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 6 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 7 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 8 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 9 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 10 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 11 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease the leasehold property to be known as flat 12 103-104 commercial road swindon SN1 5PL deriving from title number WT67903 created by a lease.

The chargor, with full title guarantee, charges by way of floating charge in favour of the lender as security for the payment and discharge of the secured obligations, all of its present and future assets (except to the extent that those assets are for the time being effectively charged by way of legal mortgage or fixed charge or assigned under clauses 3.1, 3.2 or 3.3) including any assets which have been reconverted into a floating charge under clause 4.4.
